name: Garden Defense：พืช vs สไลม์

detail.description:
Cool Plants Unite to Protect the Garden!
Simple yet incredibly fun strategy in this chill base defense game!

Login Rewards:
Log in to receive 1000 Gacha!
Gold*1500, Diamonds*200, Random Plant Essence*50, Legend Plant Solution Pack*10
Legendary Plant — Durian Man*25

◆ Conquer the Battlefield!
Gather sunlight, arrange plants,
build a powerful plant team, strategize, and resist hordes of enemies!
Protect the sunflowers and conquer every stage!

◆ Summon a Cool Plant Army!
Thailand Exclusive Event
